LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, JUN-25-2020 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT DEIDRE VON ROCK'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT PERMITS BOTH SIDES TO SUBMIT SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING LIMITED TO FIVE PAGES PER SIDE AND BOTH DUE BY JULY 9, 2020. THE COURT LIMITS THE BRIEFING TO ADDRESSING THE FIRST PRONG OF THE ANTI-SLAPP AND THE AUTHORITY CITED IN THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT WILL TAKE THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION ON JULY 9, 2020. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2021 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2020 Set For Trial On Mar-22-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendants Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. GREGORY S. WALSTON, Esq. of The Walston Law Group (Tel: 415-956-9200) appearing via CourtCall for plaintiff Nora Aponte-Woodring;
Attys. RACHEL S. BRAVO, Esq. and SARAH NICHOLS, Esq. of Nichols Law, P.C. (Tel:415-504-3095) and DEIDRE VON ROCK, Esq. of Von Rock Law, P.C. (Tel: 866-720-0195) appearing via CourtCall for defendants Deidra Von Rock and Von Rock Law, P.C.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DEIDRE VON ROCK'S Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Amended Complaint.

Argument is presented by counsel for both sides. The Court permits both sides to submit supplemental briefing limited to five pages per side and both due by July 9, 2020. The Court limits the briefing to addressing the first prong of the anti-SLAPP and the authority cited in the Court's tentative ruling. The Court will take the matter under submission on July 9, 2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
